steps.title: Identify the relationship
steps.content: Sentence 1 gives a general definition: languages no longer spoken are extinct. Sentence 2 names Umbrian, a specific case fitting that definition.

steps.title: Pick the transition
steps.content:
Specific case after a general rule = For example.

"In conclusion" wraps an argument (none here). "Therefore" signals a logical consequence (no inference is being drawn). "Admittedly" concedes — nothing's being conceded.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
